case_title: DEBORAH SMITH VS. BAUER'S INTELLIGENT TRANSPORTATION, INC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $75. SERVED MAY-21-2024, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, PAMELA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-09-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-09-2024 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF DEBORAH SMITH IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BAUER'S INTELLIGENTY TRANSPORTATION, INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY SAM MOFLEH. DEFENDANT PAMELA JOHNSON IS NOT PRESENT AND THE COURT DISMISSES THE CLAIM AGAINST HER AS SHE IS NOT A PARTY TO THIS CASE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SMITH, DEBORAH IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BAUER'S INTELLIGENT TRANSPORTATION, INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
